result.stdout:
Usage: create-sekiban-dcb-template [ProjectName] [Options]
       dnx CreateSekibanDcbTemplate [ProjectName] [Options]

Arguments:
  ProjectName  The name of the project to create. If omitted, you will be prompted.

Options:
  -t, --type   The type of template to use. Default is 'decider'.
               Available types:
                 decider          - Sekiban Dcb Decider Aspire Template (recommended)
                 dcb              - Sekiban Dcb Orleans Aspire Template
                 withoutresult    - Sekiban Dcb Orleans Aspire Template (WithoutResult)
                 pure             - Sekiban Pure Orleans Aspire Template
                 decider-aws      - Sekiban Dcb Decider AWS Template (DynamoDB)
                 withoutresult-aws - Sekiban Dcb Orleans AWS Template (DynamoDB)
  -h, --help   Show this help message.

Examples:
  create-sekiban-dcb-template MyProject
  create-sekiban-dcb-template MyProject -t decider
  create-sekiban-dcb-template MyProject -t dcb
  create-sekiban-dcb-template MyProject -t withoutresult
  create-sekiban-dcb-template MyProject -t pure
  create-sekiban-dcb-template MyProject -t decider-aws
  create-sekiban-dcb-template MyProject -t withoutresult-aws
